Control Objective: Validate that the Enterprise Technology Policy framework is maintained approved versioned and mapped to standards requirements and controls.
Validate that the EA operating model defines capabilities roles responsibilities decision rights and governance interfaces.
Validate that material technology changes receive ARB review before implementation.
Validate that approved standards patterns decisions and evidence are retained in the architecture repository.
Validate that material solutions map to business capabilities services applications and technology services.
Validate that application records include ownership lifecycle state criticality and capability mapping.
Validate that technology lifecycle risks are identified tracked remediated or governed by approved exceptions.
Validate that cloud architectures comply with approved landing zone and control patterns.
Validate that infrastructure and network designs support segmentation resilience scalability and recoverability.
Validate that material changes complete secure-by-design review including threat modeling IAM encryption data and privacy controls.
Validate that APIs and integrations are cataloged owned secured versioned and monitored.
Evidence Source: API catalog and gateway policy records

Control Objective: Validate that DevSecOps pipeline controls are active for secure code scanning dependency scanning testing secrets and release approvals.
Validate that operational resilience architecture includes dependency mapping recovery objectives failover backup and continuity alignment.
Validate that third-party technology receives architecture review before procurement implementation renewal or material expansion.
Validate that AI and emerging technology use cases complete architecture risk model risk data security and operational readiness review before production.
Framework Mapping: NIST AI RMF; Model Risk Management

Control Objective: Validate that exceptions and waivers have approval authority compensating controls expiration and renewal review.
